context: Tests whether the agent handles 12+ files across 4 areas by creating multiple logically grouped commits, correctly prioritizes feature groups before infra before docs, uses correct type prefixes per group, and keeps commit messages concise without listing individual files.

checklist.name: Multiple commits created
checklist.description: commit-log.txt shows at least 3 commits beyond the initial commit (changes are NOT collapsed into a single mixed commit)

checklist.name: Notifications grouped together
checklist.description: commit-plan.md or commit-log.txt shows all notifications files (service.js, mailer.js, templates/, tests/notifications/) in a single commit

checklist.name: Reporting grouped together
checklist.description: commit-plan.md or commit-log.txt shows all reporting files (builder.js, formatter.js, routes.js, tests/reporting/) in a single commit

checklist.name: Infra grouped separately
checklist.description: The shared infra files (logger.js, db-pool.js) are committed separately from the feature files

checklist.name: Docs type used for documentation
checklist.description: The commit(s) containing docs/ files use the `docs` type prefix

checklist.name: Feat type for features
checklist.description: The notifications and reporting commits use the `feat` type prefix

checklist.name: Chore or feat type for infra
checklist.description: The infra commit uses `chore` or `feat` type prefix (not `docs` or `fix`)

checklist.name: Plan before committing
checklist.description: commit-plan.md exists and lists proposed groups and messages (evidence that grouping was planned before staging)

checklist.name: No file listing in messages
checklist.description: No commit message enumerates individual file names (e.g., does NOT list service.js, mailer.js, builder.js, etc.)

checklist.name: Concise descriptions
checklist.description: Each commit description summarizes intent in a few words (e.g., 'add notification service') rather than describing implementation details

checklist.name: Line length ≤ 72 chars
checklist.description: All commit message lines visible in commit-log.txt are ≤ 72 characters

checklist.name: Action verb in each message
checklist.description: Each commit message description starts with an action verb (add, introduce, update, extract, or similar)
